core_rules.stamina: Resource for actions, SP = Stamina Points
core_rules.conviction: Resource for special abilities and reactions
dice_types: custom attack dice with hit/miss symbols

iron_sword.name: Iron Sword
iron_sword.description: Basic starting weapon. Reliable in close combat.

guardian_core.name: Guardian Core
guardian_core.description: Defensive core that bolsters stamina and defense.

ancient_relic.name: Ancient Relic
abilities: Once per round: Reroll a failed skill check
ancient_relic.description: Mystical relic for enhanced conviction and luck.

swift_accessory.name: Swift Boots
swift_accessory.description: Enhances mobility and evasion in tactics.

health_potion.name: Health Potion
health_potion.description: Consumable item. Use to heal during or between encounters.

stamina_elixir.name: Stamina Elixir
stamina_elixir.description: Consumable item. Use to regain stamina for actions.

fire_dagger.name: Fire Dagger
fire_dagger.description: Weapon with elemental tag. Proper mechanics for tags/symbols applied in combat.
